summary: Frontend-only e2e test of new mockup features. Verified landing pricing (29.90/29.90/49.90/99.90 with message badges 10.000/10.000/50.000/150.000) on /az and /tr — no 'token' word, no public link to admin route. Hidden admin /control-center-aio-2026 login works (rejects bad creds with toast 'Email, şifrə və ya 2FA kodu yanlışdır', accepts admin@aioperator.social / AdminAIO2026! / 482910 → /dashboard). Admin sidebar (overview/customers/usage/pricing/security/audit) all present. Admin overview shows KPIs (8 customers, 7 active, 1 trial, 268,700 messages). Admin customers table has 8 rows + view buttons → detail page renders. Admin usage page shows 'token' (allowed for admin). Pricing has 4 edit buttons; modal opens with save. Security: IP allowlist add works (10.20.30.40 appears). Audit logs table renders. SessionStorage persists across reload. Admin logout returns to login and protects routes after. Seller flow: registered fresh user → dashboard. All new sidebar items (nav-inbox/leads/orders/training/subscription) present. Inbox renders with handoff button → toast. Leads page renders (columns testid uses lead-column-* not leads-column-*). Orders shows 6 rows. Training save shows toast 'Təlimat yadda saxlanıldı'. Subscription/Usage page has usage-bar + usage-bar-fill (18% width). Zero native alert/confirm/prompt triggered. Mobile 390x844: no horizontal scroll, hamburger opens mobile-sidebar. AZ↔TR i18n works. Backend /api/health = ok.

issues: React Router v6 future-flag warnings (v7_startTransition, v7_relativeSplatPath) — non-blocking, carry-over from previous iteration.

action_items: Optional naming consistency: Leads page uses data-testid='lead-column-<status>' / 'lead-card-<id>' (singular). Spec mentioned 'leads-column-*'. Inbox uses 'inbox-handoff-btn' / 'inbox-convert-btn' rather than '*-button'. All functional — only a doc/spec mismatch. Update either the spec or the testids if you want exact alignment.
Optional: silence React Router v6 future-flag console warnings by passing future={{v7_startTransition:true, v7_relativeSplatPath:true}} to BrowserRouter.
critical_code_review_comments: PLANS in /app/frontend/src/lib/utils.js correctly updated: combo=49.90 ₼, messageLimit 10000/10000/50000/150000 — matches spec exactly.
AdminContext uses sessionStorage (clears on tab close) — protects admin routes correctly; private admin routes redirect to login when not authenticated (verified post-logout).
No native alert()/confirm()/prompt() detected in any flow — all feedback uses toast at z-[9999].
Hidden admin route /control-center-aio-2026 is NOT linked from any public HTML — verified by HTML scan.
Word 'token' is absent from all seller-facing pages (overview, inbox, leads, orders, training, subscription) and present (intentionally) only on admin usage/pricing pages.
Mobile responsive holds: admin and seller dashboards have no horizontal scroll at 390x844; hamburger toggles work.
Usage bar deterministic mock works (fill width 18% on a freshly registered combo user; matches mockUsageForUser(userId, plan)).
Admin audit logs include 'IP bloklandı', 'Paket qiyməti dəyişdirildi', 'Müştəri limiti dəyişdirildi' rows — actions translated to AZ correctly.

success_rate.backend: 100% (health check only — full 19/19 from prev iteration unchanged)

test_credentials: Admin: admin@aioperator.social / AdminAIO2026! / 2FA 482910. Seller: register-on-demand qa.seller+<rand>@aioperator.local / Password123!.
seed_data_creation: Created one seller account (qa.seller+<timestamp>@aioperator.local) via /api/auth/register. All other data is mock (MOCK_CUSTOMERS, MOCK_LEADS, MOCK_ORDERS, MOCK_INBOX, MOCK_AUDIT_LOGS, etc.) and resets per page-load.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Public preview URL: https://orders-layout-fix.preview.emergentagent.com (also reachable at https://orders-layout-fix.preview.emergentagent.com). Admin route is /control-center-aio-2026 (login) and /control-center-aio-2026/dashboard/{overview|customers|usage|pricing|security|audit}. Admin testids: admin-login-page, admin-email, admin-password, admin-2fa, admin-login-submit, admin-overview/customers/usage/pricing/security/audit, admin-customer-row-<id>, admin-customer-view-<id>, admin-customer-detail-<id>, admin-pricing-edit-<id>, admin-pricing-modal, admin-pricing-save, admin-ip-input, admin-ip-add, admin-logout. Seller testids: nav-overview/inbox/leads/orders/training/subscription/bots/products/activity/settings, inbox-page, inbox-handoff-btn, inbox-convert-btn, inbox-item-<id>, leads-page, lead-column-<status>, lead-card-<id>, orders-page, training-page, training-save, usage-bar, usage-bar-fill, mobile-menu-toggle. Admin session is sessionStorage-only.
rca of the issue: No real bugs found. The two false-negative testid lookups in my first pass (leads-column-* and inbox-convert-order) were due to my test using wrong prefixes; actual implementation uses lead-column-* (singular) and inbox-convert-btn — pages render fine and are functional.
